title: Black Current
text: A cold current drags the fight sideways. Dungeon Score +1.
win: Recover 1 lost troop after claiming the Power.

title: Pearl Lanterns
text: Ancient lights reveal the safest path. Dungeon Score -1.
win: Claim Oceanic Tides and gain 1 gold.
lose: Lose 1 gold instead of 2 if choosing gold loss.

title: Drowned Kings
text: The dead kings rise in armour of salt. Dungeon Score +2.
win: Gain 1 Mastery as well as Oceanic Tides.
lose: Discard 1 committed troop and draw 1 Curse.

title: Low Tide
text: The water falls, exposing cracked steps. No score change.
win: Draw 1 Bonus after claiming the Power.
lose: Choose: discard 1 committed troop or lose 2 gold.
